summary: Backend testing completed successfully (100% pass rate). Frontend testing blocked by login/routing issue - app stuck on login page despite correct credentials. Backend APIs for all new features (line KPIs with date ranges, WO claim action, closure rate KPI, AWS predictive trigger, etc.) are working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: App stuck on login page - does not progress to Control Room after login attempt. Login form visible with credentials pre-filled but clicking 'SIGN IN TO CONTROL ROOM' button does not navigate to the app.
critical_bugs.selector: Login page, button with text 'SIGN IN TO CONTROL ROOM'
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all frontend testing - cannot access any pages in the application

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /control-room/line-kpis?hours=8 - Returns 6 lines with availability, downtime, active_breakdown_since, sections
✅ Backend: GET /control-room/line-kpis with custom date range (date_from/date_to) - 200 OK
✅ Backend: POST /work-orders (unassigned) - Creates WO with status=OPEN, assigned_to=null
✅ Backend: PUT /work-orders/{id} action=claim - Tech successfully claims unassigned WO, status changes to ASSIGNED
✅ Backend: GET /analytics/kpis - closure_rate, breakdowns_closed, breakdowns_reported, pareto fields present
✅ Backend: All new API endpoints responding correctly
✅ Backend: Work order claim workflow functional

success_percentage.frontend: 0% (blocked by login issue - unable to test any UI features)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend login/routing issue. App is stuck on login page and does not navigate to Control Room after clicking sign in button. This blocks all frontend testing. Once fixed, the following features need UI testing: (A) Control Room filter ribbon positioning above line KPI cards, (E) custom date range slicer + presets, (F/G) no flavor text on cards, (H) live breakdown timer ribbon, (I) Kanban UNASSIGNED column + claim button, (J) closure rules UI, (K) AWS/Predictive filter, (C) WO deep-link ?wo=<id>, (D) My Tasks toggle, (L) fuzzy search in Report Breakdown, (M) AWS health pools display, (N) Analytics Closure Rate + Pareto chart, hierarchy admin CRUD UI.
